properties.description: Forces all traffic leaving spoke subnets through the FortiGate NVA by deploying a route table with a default route (0.0.0.0/0) to the NVA next hop on spoke subnets that do not already have a route table.
properties.displayName: Deploy spoke route table forcing egress through FortiGate NVA

nonComplianceMessages.message: Spoke subnets must route all egress traffic through the FortiGate NVA.
